name: SpeedDial
description: Floating action button that fans out sub-actions.

api.name: SpeedDial
api.description: Floating action button that fans out sub-actions.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The actions revealed when the dial opens, rendered as a menu of buttons with the item's label as an accessible name and a hover/focus tooltip.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional trigger icon override (text/emoji, like Icon). When unset, a Lucide plus icon that rotates into an × while open is rendered.

parameters.name: Position
parameters.description: Fixed-viewport corner the dial anchors to. Defaults to BottomRight.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Direction the action menu fans out from the trigger. Also determines the menu's ARIA orientation (vertical for Up/Down, horizontal for Left/Right). Defaults to Up.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Trigger color variant following the Button variant names: "Default" (primary), "Secondary", "Destructive", "Outline", "Ghost".

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the trigger cannot be activated; an already-open menu is closed immediately so it can't be left trapped open.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root wrapper.

examples.title: Basic Speed Dial (Bottom Right)
examples.code:
<SpeedDial Items="@_actions" />

@code {
    private List<SpeedDial.SpeedDialItem> _actions = new()
    {
        new() { Label = "New Document", Icon = "📄" },
        new() { Label = "Upload File", Icon = "📁" },
        new() { Label = "Add Reminder", Icon = "🔔" },
    };
}

mdSummary:
# SpeedDial

Floating action button that fans out sub-actions.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/speed-dial

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SpeedDial | Items | `List\<SpeedDialItem\>` | `new()` | The actions revealed when the dial opens, rendered as a menu of buttons with the item's label as an accessible name and a hover/focus tooltip. |
| SpeedDial | Icon | `string?` | `` | Optional trigger icon override (text/emoji, like Icon). When unset, a Lucide plus icon that rotates into an × while open is rendered. |
| SpeedDial | Position | `SpeedDialPosition` | `SpeedDialPosition.BottomRight` | Fixed-viewport corner the dial anchors to. Defaults to BottomRight. |
| SpeedDial | Direction | `SpeedDialDirection` | `SpeedDialDirection.Up` | Direction the action menu fans out from the trigger. Also determines the menu's ARIA orientation (vertical for Up/Down, horizontal for Left/Right). Defaults to Up. |
| SpeedDial | Variant | `string` | `"Default"` | Trigger color variant following the Button variant names: "Default" (primary), "Secondary", "Destructive", "Outline", "Ghost". |
| SpeedDial | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | When true, the trigger cannot be activated; an already-open menu is closed immediately so it can't be left trapped open. |
| SpeedDial | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper. |
| SpeedDial | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root wrapper. |

## Slots
